specific_question: What cybersecurity measures is Elexion Automotive implementing to help protect its vehicles and customers leading into 2026?
answer: In October 2025, Elexion Automotive signed a contract with a team of researchers to perform penetration testing and red teaming efforts, which is set to kick off in Q1 2026. These efforts will be conducted in conjunction with the internal cybersecurity team to further ensure customer safety and expand on the team's ongoing work.
dr_question: Given the Help Net Security article from April 2025, what strategies should Elexion Automotive be cognizant of to protect its consumer base from remote cybersecurity attacks going into Q1 of 2026?
